title: Raw Quantitative Data Collection
note: Data collection in progress. Coverage is partial across 27 firms. Market cap reference date is approximately 2026-03-04 to 2026-03-06. FY2024 = calendar year ended Dec 31, 2024 for most firms; exceptions noted (STEP/HLNE use March fiscal year, ICG uses March fiscal year, 3i uses March fiscal year).

MET-VD-001.source: Blackstone Q4 2024 earnings press release: DE $6.0B, ~1.23B diluted shares
MET-VD-001.notes: DE of $6.0B for FY2024, up 18% YoY. Per share ~$4.88 based on diluted shares.
